runners.formComment: Hit the frame last time at this track but the start prior was a strong winner scoring by 1.75 lengths in a OPEN at this track and recording a superb 21.71 over the 380m journey. Can measure up on top win two back.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 380m in 21.85. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 380m at this track at Grade 1/2 level. Scored two on the trot prior to last start. Can return to form.

runners.formComment: Lifted to win two runs back and scored again last start over 380m at this track (21.66,) beating Organised Kaos. Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.

runners.formComment: Strong performance to win by 5.5 lengths at this track over 380m (21.38) beating Emgrand Drive in OPEN on April 7. Looks a solid hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground exiting the first turn.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.59) when eighth over 380m at this track in a OPEN. Strong record off the draw with three wins and four minors from seven starts. Tough line-up and may struggle.

runners.formComment: In great form with wins at his last two. Scored most recently over 380m at this track in Grade 3/4 class a week ago. Hard to entertain this time.

runners.formComment: Hit the frame latest (21.91) when second at this track in a Free For All. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looks a place chance at best.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 380m. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 3/4 on April 7 over 380m at this track behind Cuban Eight beaten 5.5 lengths (22.10). Has run hot time here with a 21.54 PB at the distance. Key chance.
